email.label: Email
email.description: Primary contact email used for sign-in and notifications.

title.label: Post title
title.description: The primary title shown on the post page, in listings, and in admin search results.

slug.label: URL slug
slug.description: Used in the public URL. It is auto-generated from the title if you leave it empty.

metadata.label: Publishing metadata
metadata.description: Extra metadata rendered with inline info icons in the form label and for nested key-value fields.

featured.label: Featured post
featured.description: Marks the post as featured so storefronts or landing pages can prioritize it.

locale.label: Content locale
locale.description: Primary language/locale of the post content.

readingMinutes.label: Reading time
readingMinutes.description: Estimated reading time shown to end users, in minutes.

channel.label: Distribution channel
channel.description: The main acquisition or distribution channel for this post.

reviewerEmail.label: Reviewer email
reviewerEmail.description: Internal reviewer or approver for the content. You can pick an existing user or type any email.
reviewerEmail.placeholder: pick a user or type any email

label.label: Display label
label.description: Friendly name shown in the UI for the saved favorite item.

kind.label: Favorite type
kind.description: Controls which relation field becomes visible below.

postId.label: Post
postId.description: Choose this when the favorite points to a post.

productId.label: Product
productId.description: Choose this when the favorite points to a product.

categoryId.label: Category
categoryId.description: Choose this when the favorite points to a category.

name.label: Campaign name
name.description: Internal campaign or promo name used by the content team.

region.label: Region
region.description: Select the active region to reveal the matching localized title and preview fields.

thumbnail.label: Thumbnail image
thumbnail.description: Main preview image used in product listings.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.description: Additional product images. Supports multiple uploads.
